registration.title: Registration
registration.fillAllRequired: Please fill in all required fields
registration.phoneWhatsappHint: Please enter a phone number that has WhatsApp — it's the only way we can contact you.
registration.selectAvailableTimes: Select available study times — Mecca timezone

registration.agreement: I pledge to attend regularly, respect the etiquette of the Quran circle, submit reports, and refrain from posting external links.
registration.agreementTeacher: I pledge to attend regularly, respect the etiquette of the Quran circle, and refrain from posting external links.
registration.successMessage: Thank you for registering at Wahdaynak Academy
registration.successDetail: Your application will be reviewed and we will contact you soon.
registration.successWhatsapp: We will contact you via WhatsApp once your details have been reviewed by the administration.
registration.successHeadline: Your registration has been submitted successfully

dashboard.studentWelcome: May Allah help you memorize His Noble Book
dashboard.studentSubtitle: Track your progress in your Quran memorization journey

assignment.confirmRemoveBody: Are you sure you want to remove {{student}} from "{{halaqah}}"? This cannot be undone.

feedback.title: Complaints & suggestions
feedback.subtitle: Write your complaint or suggestion and we'll forward it to the administration.

feedback.submitInvalid: Invalid input. Please review your message and try again.
feedback.submitDeliveryFailed: We received your message but could not deliver it to the administration. Please contact them directly.
feedback.serviceUnavailable: Feedback service is not configured yet. Please contact administration.

report.shareCopiedAndOpened: Report copied — paste it into your halaqah's WhatsApp group.
report.shareUnavailable: Sharing isn't available on this device. Try again from another browser.
report.editPageSubtitle: Update the details of a previously submitted report

seo.defaultTitle: Wahdaynak Academy — Online Quran Learning & Memorization
seo.defaultDescription: Wahdaynak Academy: online Quran memorization, tajweed and ijazah programs taught by qualified teachers — structured halaqahs and personal follow-up for every student.

home.title: Wahdaynak Academy — Learn & Memorize the Quran Online
home.description: Learn, memorize, and perfect the recitation of the Holy Quran with experienced teachers at Wahdaynak Academy — structured halaqahs, ijazah pathways, and personal follow-up.

login.title: Log in
login.description: Log in to your Wahdaynak Academy account to continue your halaqahs and lessons.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Create your Wahdaynak Academy account to join Quran memorization halaqahs and learn the sciences of the Quran.

registerStudent.title: Register as a student
registerStudent.description: Register as a student at Wahdaynak Academy to join Quran memorization, review and mastery halaqahs.

registerTeacher.title: Register as a teacher
registerTeacher.description: Join Wahdaynak Academy as a Quran teacher and help students complete their memorization journey.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Recover access to your Wahdaynak Academy account by resetting your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your Wahdaynak Academy account.

success.title: Registration successful
success.description: Your registration request to Wahdaynak Academy was received successfully.

halaqah.title: Halaqah details
halaqah.description: Halaqah details and student performance at Wahdaynak Academy.

report.title: New report
report.description: Add a memorization and review report at Wahdaynak Academy.

blog.title: Wahdaynak Academy Blog — Quran memorization & tajweed articles
blog.description: Expert articles on Quran memorization, tajweed, and teaching methodologies for kids and adults from Wahdaynak Academy.

blog.title: Wahdaynak Blog
blog.description: Practical guides for learning the Quran — memorization, tajweed, review techniques. Written for beginners, kids, and busy adults.
blog.notFoundBody: We couldn't find the article you were looking for.
blog.empty: No articles in this category yet.
blog.endCtaBody: Join Wahdaynak Academy halaqahs led by certified Quran teachers.

academy.title: Wahdaynak Academy
academy.subtitle: for the Noble Quran and its Sciences
academy.description: Wahdaynak Academy — a journey to ponder the verses of Allah, so that the Quran becomes the spring of your heart and the light of your chest.
academy.hadith: The best of you are those who learn the Quran and teach it

landing.feature1Desc: Memorization and review circles led by specialised teachers.
landing.feature3Desc: Track your progress with detailed periodic reports.

adminSettings.title: Academy settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Control the academy name, description, and contact channels
adminSettings.closuresHint: Mark a time slot as temporarily complete. Teachers registering will see it disabled and pick another time. Students are not affected.
adminSettings.closuresHow1: Closures are set per gender segment — closing 7-9 PM for women doesn't affect men.
adminSettings.closuresHow2: New teacher registration disables the slot only for applicants of the matching gender.
adminSettings.closuresHow3: Students are not affected — they can still register and join running halaqahs.
adminSettings.closuresEmptyClosed: No time slots are closed for this segment. Tap any open slot below to mark it as temporarily complete.
adminSettings.unopenedHow1: Mark a slot as "not yet available" when no halaqah has opened for it — students of the matching gender won't see it during registration.
adminSettings.unopenedHow2: Once a teacher is activated for that time, unmark the slot so students can pick it again.
adminSettings.unopenedHow3: Teachers are not affected by this list — they still see every slot except the ones you closed in the section above.
adminSettings.unopenedEmptyClosed: No time slots are marked as unavailable for this segment. Tap any available slot below to hide it from student registration.

teacherFields.quranPartsTaught: Number of Quran parts you can teach

errors.network: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.

admin.missingTimeSlotTitle: This halaqah has no time slot set

admin.noAssignedStudents: No students assigned to this halaqah

matching.noPlacements: Nothing to place — everyone matchable is already assigned.
